description_long: This house is built into a rugged rocky landscape, with its structure partially embedded among large boulders and stone outcrops. The building features a modern, boxy design with flat roofs, white and light gray facades, and several vertical brown columns or chimneys rising from the roofline. Vegetation, including small shrubs and grasses, grows around the rocks and along the edges of the house, blending the structure with its natural surroundings. A prominent stone or concrete ramp leads up to the main entrance, which is set back from the rocky terrain. The windows are arranged in a somewhat regular pattern, with large panes providing views outward, and the overall appearance is that of a contemporary residence harmonized with a rocky hillside. The house appears to be multi-leveled, with the main living areas elevated above the ground and integrated into the landscape.
description: A modern, multi-level house built into a rocky hillside, featuring flat roofs, white and gray facades, and surrounded by boulders and vegetation. The structure blends contemporary design with natural stone elements and has a prominent entry ramp.
description_view_0: The house is seen from a low angle, highlighting the entry ramp, rocky terrain, and the main facade with large windows and vertical columns.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the long entry ramp leading up to the house, with the structure partially obscured by rocks and vegetation.
description_view_2: The rear and side of the house are visible, showing more of the rocky landscape, vertical columns, and the integration of the building with the terrain.
description_view_3: The house is seen from the opposite side, with the rocky outcrop and vegetation dominating the foreground and the building's flat roof and windows visible above.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway accessed by a wide stone or concrete ramp, with minimal overhang and no porch, emphasizing clean lines and integration with the rocky landscape.
